rail.name: Meadowlands Station
rail.description: Direct service to Penn Station NYC on event days. Platform at east plaza.
rail.schedule: Trains depart 20-40 minutes after final whistle. Check NJ Transit app for exact times.

bus.name: NJ Transit Bus 355
bus.description: Service between Port Authority Bus Terminal (Midtown Manhattan) and MetLife Stadium
bus.schedule: Departs Port Authority from 3 hours before kickoff. Return service after game.

bus.name: Local Shuttle Bus
bus.description: Circulates between parking lots and stadium gates
bus.schedule: Every 10 minutes, 2 hours before and 2 hours after game.

rideshare.pickupZone: East plaza, designated rideshare zone near Gate B
rideshare.notes: Use NJ Turnpike Exit 16W. Follow stadium signage for rideshare drop-off.

generalNotes: MetLife Stadium is located at 1 MetLife Stadium Dr, East Rutherford, NJ. NJ Turnpike Exit 16W (from south) or 16E (from north). I-95 to NJ-3 also available. Check NJ Transit or Google Maps for live transit updates.
